name: HOUND: AUTOMATON
short_description: In this hyper-realistic multiplayer horror game, one player starts as The Hound, while up to 15 players are human survivors trying to hide. Navigate through hyper-realistic environments, and experience the ultimate survival horror experience in multiplayer.
detailed_description:
In a world where technology has taken an unexpected turn, a robotic entity known as the Hound pursues human survivors. Gather up to 15 players for an exciting game of cat and mouse where roles can change in an instant!

Key Features:

• Dynamic 1 vs Many Gameplay: One player starts randomly as the Hound, hunting down human survivors. As the game progresses, caught players join the Hound's team, creating an ever-evolving challenge.

• Friend-filled Frights: Perfect for game nights, Hound: AUTOMATON offers a unique blend of horror and fun best enjoyed with friends.

• Atmospheric Environments: From spooky abandoned warehouses to eerie cemetery grounds, each map is designed to keep you on your toes.

• Quick Rounds: Experience fast-paced matches lasting 5-7 minutes, ideal for multiple plays in a single game session.

• Customizable Experience: Adjust settings to create the perfect balance of scares and laughs for your group.

• Regular Updates: Look forward to future additions including new characters, levels, and game modes to keep the excitement fresh.

Explore a variety of carefully crafted maps: • Warehouses with plenty of hiding spots among shipping containers • Misty cemeteries featuring old churches and shadowy graveyards

Hound: AUTOMATON's attention to visual and audio detail creates an immersive experience. The moody lighting and atmospheric sound design enhance the thrill of the hunt.

Whether you're strategizing with fellow survivors or working together as hunters, Hound: AUTOMATON offers a unique party game experience that blends horror and hilarity.

Gather your friends, turn down the lights, and prepare for a night of screams and laughter!

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
